metadata.title: NBPKOREA | Industrial Combustion & Environmental Equipment
metadata.description: NBPKOREA, established in 2006, is a specialist in industrial combustion equipment and environmental systems. We design, manufacture, and install high-efficiency solutions including metal fiber burners, environmental systems (RTO, RCO, CTO), and industrial gas heaters.
metadata.keywords: NBPKOREA, industrial burner, metal fiber burner, RTO, RCO, CTO, environmental equipment, combustion equipment, gas heater, VOCs, regenerative thermal oxidizer

home.title: NBPKOREA | Industrial Combustion & Environmental Equipment
home.description: Specialists in industrial combustion and environmental systems. Metal fiber burners, RTO, RCO, CTO high-efficiency solutions. Est. 2006, trusted by 80+ major companies.

about.title: About Us | NBPKOREA
about.description: NBPKOREA, founded in Ansan, Korea in 2006. 17 registered patents, global partnerships in USA & Turkey, solutions delivered to 80+ major enterprises.

business.title: Business Areas | NBPKOREA
business.description: NBPKOREA's three core business areas: Environmental Systems (RTO, RCO, CTO, TO), Combustion Systems (gas heaters, dehumidifiers, paint dryers), Industrial Burners.

nkCto.title: NK-CTO Catalytic Thermal Oxidizer | NBPKOREA
nkCto.description: NK-CTO neutralizes VOCs and odors at low temperatures using catalysts. Minimizes NOx formation. Ideal for semiconductor, painting, chemical, and food industries.

nkRto.title: NK-RTO Regenerative Thermal Oxidizer | NBPKOREA
nkRto.description: NK-RTO recovers combustion heat through regenerative media. 99%+ thermal efficiency, energy-saving VOC treatment system.

nkRco.title: NK-RCO Regenerative Catalytic Oxidizer | NBPKOREA
nkRco.description: NK-RCO combines regenerative heat recovery with catalytic combustion for high-efficiency VOC treatment at lower operating temperatures.

nkTo.title: NK-TO Direct-Fired Thermal Oxidizer | NBPKOREA
nkTo.description: NK-TO treats VOCs via high-temperature direct combustion. Optimized for high-concentration, high-volume exhaust gas processing.

nkgh.title: NKGH Direct-Fired Gas Heater | NBPKOREA
nkgh.description: NKGH Series direct-fired gas heaters, 25,000–1,000,000 kcal/h. Optimal for automotive paint booths, shipyard block shops, and warehouses.

nkIdgh.title: NK-IDGH Indirect Gas Heater | NBPKOREA
nkIdgh.description: NK-IDGH provides indirect heating via heat exchanger. Suitable for clean-environment workplaces.

dehumidifier.description: NBPKOREA hybrid dehumidifier combining combustion and cooling methods for high-efficiency industrial dehumidification.

hero.title: NBPKOREA
hero.subtitle: Industrial combustion equipment & environmental systems — rewriting the standard of performance

company.description: Since its founding in 2006, NBPKOREA has been providing eco-friendly energy solutions to domestic and international industrial sites including shipbuilding, automotive, steel, and plant sectors with over 20 years of experience and expertise. We actively invest in the development of advanced energy-saving eco-friendly products, striving to become a global leader that creates greater value for a world where humans and nature coexist.

environment.title: Environmental Systems
environment.description: Regenerative Thermal Oxidizers (RTO) recover combustion heat through regenerative media for energy-efficient thermal reuse in production processes. Regenerative Catalytic Oxidizers (RCO) combine catalytic and regenerative technology for high-efficiency treatment. Catalytic Thermal Oxidizers (CTO) neutralize odorous compounds in exhaust gas at low temperatures using catalysts while minimizing NOx formation. From TO and DTO systems to turnkey VOC and odor control across 14+ industries including semiconductors, painting, chemicals, and food processing — NBPKOREA delivers end-to-end design, fabrication, installation, and maintenance.

hvac.title: HVAC Systems
hvac.description: Precision temperature, humidity, and cleanliness control for advanced industries — semiconductor cleanrooms, secondary battery Dry Rooms, pharmaceutical GMP, direct-fired AHUs, door heaters, and combined dehumidifiers. We design, manufacture, and install energy-efficient HVAC solutions.

combustion.title: Combustion Systems
combustion.description: High-efficiency combustion environmental systems available only from NBPKOREA worldwide. From direct-fired gas heaters and indirect gas heaters to combined dehumidifiers and vehicle paint dryers — we deliver compact, optimized combustion solutions for automotive paint booths, shipyard block shops, warehouses, and food and chemical plants.

burner.title: Industrial Burners
burner.description: NBPKOREA's proprietary metal fiber burners maximize energy efficiency through uniform combustion and infrared radiant heat while dramatically reducing NOx emissions. The compact metal burner saves installation space with its space-saving design and enables easy maintenance. Applicable to all equipment requiring high-temperature combustion including industrial boilers, incinerators, drying ovens, thermal oil boilers, power plants, and petrochemical plants.

history.label: Our History
history.description: Since its founding in Ansan, Gyeonggi-do in 2006, NBPKOREA has continuously innovated in industrial combustion equipment and environmental systems. Twenty years of history built on trust, challenge, and passion.

partners.description: Over 80 major domestic and international companies trust NBPKOREA's technology. We respond to the demands of industrial sites with global partnerships and field-proven technology.

businessHighlight.mainDesc: NBPKOREA's core business area. We design and manufacture industrial combustion systems including duct burners, direct-fired and indirect gas heaters, delivering low-NOx, high-efficiency combustion solutions through our technology alliance with MIDCO International (USA).

environment.title: Environmental Systems
environment.desc: We design and manufacture industrial environmental systems that treat hazardous gases and odors through high-temperature oxidation.

hvac.title: HVAC Systems
hvac.desc: We provide cleanroom and dry room HVAC systems for precision industries such as semiconductors and secondary batteries.

burner.title: Industrial Burners
burner.desc: We offer a diverse lineup of industrial burners including duct burners, MPG burners, and metal fiber burners.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.emailReply: Reply within 24 hours on business days
contact.visitDesc: Schedule a visit to our Ansan HQ

about.title: ABOUT US
about.subtitle: Elevating industrial value through trust, challenge, and passion

ceo.label: CEO Message
ceo.title: Message from the CEO
ceo.p1: Since its founding in 2006, NBPKOREA has provided eco-friendly energy solutions to industrial sites in shipbuilding, automotive, steel, and plant sectors with over 20 years of expertise in planning, design, manufacturing, construction, and after-service.
ceo.p2: As a specialist in environmental and energy solutions, NBPKOREA actively invests in the development of advanced energy-saving eco-friendly products in line with global environmental and energy diversification policies, and is vigorously advancing the future of the advanced energy and environmental industry.
ceo.p3: Going forward, NBPKOREA will continue striving to provide the world's best quality and service in the environmental and energy sectors, working to become a global leader that creates greater value for a world where humans and nature coexist.

vision.title: Vision & Mission
vision.visionText: As a global leader in industrial combustion and environmental systems, we create cleaner and more efficient industrial environments
vision.missionText: We simultaneously improve energy efficiency and environmental conditions at industrial sites through customized technical solutions
vision.coreValueText: We grow together with our customers based on Trust, Challenge, and Passion

business.title: BUSINESS AREAS
business.subtitle: Environmental and combustion systems — two pillars elevating industrial value

environment.title: Environmental Systems Division
environment.description: We design, manufacture, and install environmental systems including Regenerative Thermal Oxidizers (RTO), Regenerative Catalytic Oxidizers (RCO), Catalytic Thermal Oxidizers (CTO), Thermal Oxidizers (TO), and Direct Thermal Oxidizers (DTO) to treat volatile organic compounds (VOCs) and odors generated at industrial sites.

hvac.title: HVAC Systems Division
hvac.description: We design, manufacture, and install precision air conditioning systems for semiconductor cleanrooms, secondary battery Dry Rooms, pharmaceutical GMP facilities, and more. Our solutions include direct-fired AHUs, door heaters, and combined dehumidifiers for energy-efficient climate control.

combustion.title: Combustion Systems Division
combustion.description: We design, manufacture, and supply high-efficiency combustion equipment for various industries, including industrial direct/indirect gas heaters, proprietary metal fiber burners, combined dehumidifiers, and vehicle paint drying systems.

shipbuilding.title: Shipbuilding & Marine
shipbuilding.description: We supply combustion and environmental systems optimized for the unique environments of shipyards, including hull block construction, paint drying, tank dehumidification, and ship component heat treatment.
shipbuilding.clients: Hanwha Ocean, HD Hyundai Mipo, Daewoo Shipbuilding, Samsung Heavy Industries

automotive.title: Automotive
automotive.description: We provide thermal and environmental solutions for automotive production lines, including body paint drying, component heat treatment, paint booth deodorization, and factory ventilation.

heavyIndustry.title: Heavy Industry & Chemicals
heavyIndustry.description: We handle high-temperature solutions for the heavy chemical industry, including plant process heating, chemical process heat supply, exhaust gas treatment, and industrial equipment heat treatment.
heavyIndustry.clients: POSCO, LG Chem, SK Innovation, Doosan Enerbility

environmental.title: Environmental & Odor Control
environmental.description: We supply environmental systems (RTO, CTO, RCO) to treat VOCs and odors at various industrial sites including semiconductors, painting, food processing, and pharmaceuticals.
environmental.clients: Semiconductor manufacturers, food processors, pharmaceutical companies, etc.

burner.title: Industrial Burner Division
burner.description: NBPKOREA's proprietary metal fiber burners maximize energy efficiency through uniform combustion and infrared radiant heat while dramatically reducing NOx emissions. The compact metal burner saves installation space with its space-saving design and enables easy maintenance. Applicable to all equipment requiring high-temperature combustion including industrial boilers, incinerators, drying ovens, thermal oil boilers, power plants, and petrochemical plants.

20 Years of Expertise

common.whyDesc: Backed by our own R&D, 17 registered patents, and global partnerships in the US and Turkey, we provide one-stop service — design, manufacturing, installation, and A/S — for everything from environmental systems to combustion equipment.
common.ctaMainDesc: We will propose the optimal environmental and combustion equipment for your site conditions. Consult with our specialist engineers.

nkCto.subtitle: Catalytic Thermal Oxidizer
nkCto.description: Oxidatively decomposes VOCs and odors at low temperatures (250–450°C) using a catalyst. An energy-efficient environmental system with over 98% treatment efficiency and favorable NOx reduction.
nkCto.heroDesc1: CTO uses a catalyst to combust (contact oxidation) and render harmless odorous substances contained in exhaust gas — chemically the same as ordinary combustion decomposition. The catalytic material acts as a facilitator, participating in combustion to accelerate the reaction, enabling a new combustion technology that greatly reduces nitrogen oxide (NOx) generation from low-temperature, low-concentration combustion while significantly improving energy savings.
nkCto.heroDesc2: Catalytic combustion oxidation at normal temperatures of 250–450°C achieves combustion efficiency of 98% or more for odorous substances, with a very high treatment efficiency of about 99% for odor concentration. It is also environmentally friendly with few secondary pollution factors.
features: Maximum heat recovery rate of 95% or more
Minimized NOx generation through low-temperature oxidation
Minimized installation space through complete design technology
Gas cost possible based on soft switching flow
Inverter switching system applied according to capacity changes
Vertical inspection for maintenance safety and continuity
Various layouts possible depending on site installation conditions
Specialized product with technical and design protection
Eco-friendly system with no secondary pollutants
nkCto.tableClickModel: Click a row to select your desired model
nkCto.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

nkRto.subtitle: Regenerative Thermal Oxidizer
nkRto.description: Oxidatively decomposes VOCs at high temperatures above 850°C, recovering over 95% of heat through regenerative media. A high-efficiency environmental system suitable for high-volume air flow treatment.
nkRto.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

nkRco.subtitle: Regenerative Catalytic Oxidizer
nkRco.description: A hybrid system combining the advantages of regenerative and catalytic methods. Optimized for treating high-concentration VOCs in medium to small air volumes.
nkRco.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

nkTo.subtitle: Thermal Oxidizer
nkTo.description: Directly oxidatively treats high-concentration odors and VOCs by direct combustion at 700–900°C. Suitable for small-scale sites and intermittent generation processes.
nkTo.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

cleanroom.subtitle: Cleanroom AHU
cleanroom.description: Cleanroom HVAC system optimized for ultra-clean environments in semiconductor, display, pharmaceutical (GMP), and precision equipment industries. Achieves Class 1–100,000 cleanliness with HEPA/ULPA filtration, precision temperature/humidity control, and positive pressure management.

dryRoom.subtitle: Dry Room AHU
dryRoom.description: Ultra-low humidity Dry Room HVAC system specialized for secondary battery (lithium-ion) manufacturing. Maintains dew point below -40°C to ensure electrode and assembly process quality and safety.

directAhu.subtitle: Direct-Fired Air Handling Unit
directAhu.description: High-efficiency air handling unit that directly heats air using gas combustion. Significantly reduces energy costs compared to electric heaters, with rapid temperature rise for large spaces and precise proportional control.

doorHeater.subtitle: Door Heater
doorHeater.description: Air curtain heater installed at factory, logistics center, and cold storage entrances to block outside cold air and maintain indoor temperature. Gas direct-fired operation reduces operating costs compared to electric air curtains.

dehumidifier.subtitle: Combined Dehumidifier
dehumidifier.description: Combined dehumidification system combining cooling dehumidifier and direct-fired gas heater. Achieves 30% fuel cost reduction, 4-season hybrid operation, and 8,500–30,000 m³/h airflow for shipyard block shops, paint workshops, and cleanrooms.

nkgh.subtitle: Direct-Fired Gas Heater
nkgh.description: Direct-fired industrial gas heater for rapidly heating large spaces such as shipyards, warehouses, and factories. 5-model lineup from 250,000 to 1,000,000 Kcal/h.
nkgh.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal capacity and installation method for your site conditions.

nkIdgh.subtitle: Indirect Gas Heater
nkIdgh.description: Indirect heating method supplying clean air through a heat exchanger. Optimal for environments requiring clean air such as paint booths, food processing, and clean rooms.
nkIdgh.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

dehumidifier.subtitle: Combined Dehumidifier
dehumidifier.description: Combined refrigeration dehumidification and gas heating package. 4-season operation support, dedicated to high-humidity environments like ship block painting, welding, and clean rooms.
dehumidifier.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

paintDryer.subtitle: Paint Dryer System
paintDryer.description: Hot air drying system specialized for automotive paint booths. 1,250,000 Kcal/h high output, PLC proportional control, supplied to KIA and BMW partners.
paintDryer.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

ductBurner.subtitle: Duct Burner — Metal Fiber Surface Combustion
ductBurner.description: Duct heating burner using metal fiber surface combustion method. Various lineup from 0.5FT to 5FT, 30-step precise flame control, low NOx/CO emissions.
ductBurner.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

fpbBurner.subtitle: MPG Burner
fpbBurner.description: Industrial burner lineup based on MIDCO (USA) technology partnership. Offers 13 categories of combustion solutions including gas burners, dual-fuel burners, fuel oil burners, and process burners.
fpbBurner.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

metalFiberBurner.subtitle: Metal Fiber Burner
metalFiberBurner.description: NBPKOREA's proprietary metal fiber burner. Maximizes energy efficiency through uniform combustion and infrared radiant heat while dramatically reducing NOx emissions.
metalFiberBurner.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

furnaceBurner.subtitle: Furnace Burner — High-Temp Industrial Furnace
furnaceBurner.description: Burner optimized for high-temperature industrial furnaces including steel heating furnaces, melting furnaces, glass melting furnaces, plastic heating furnaces, building materials, and rotary kilns. Supports Gas+Oil dual-fuel operation.
furnaceBurner.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

lowNoxBurner.subtitle: Low NOx Burner — ECOSTAR Next-Generation
lowNoxBurner.description: ECOSTAR (Turkey) next-generation Low NOx gas burner, compliant with EN 676:2020 NOx Class 3 and EN 303 standards. Integrates precision combustion control via electronic 1:6 modulation, hinged maintenance design, gas leak detection, and ionization flame sensing to deliver an eco-friendly low-emission solution optimized for industrial sites under environmental regulations.
lowNoxBurner.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

ovenBurner.subtitle: Oven Burner — Heat Treatment Specialized
ovenBurner.description: Burner specialized for dry ovens and drying equipment including food processing, plastic thermoforming, paint drying, printing/coating, cement, and textile tenter dryers.
ovenBurner.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

valveTrain.subtitle: Valve Train Parts — Gas Control System
valveTrain.description: Valve train assemblies for safe and precise gas supply control of industrial burners. Configures gas control systems with gas valves, regulators, and safety shut-off devices tailored to site conditions.
valveTrain.ctaDesc: We will propose the optimal specifications for your site conditions.

technology.title: TECHNOLOGY & R&D
technology.subtitle: Leading industrial combustion and environmental technology through continuous research and innovation

metalBurner.title: High-Efficiency Metal Fiber Burner
metalBurner.description: Our proprietary metal fiber burner utilizes heat-resistant metal fibers as the combustion surface to maximize infrared radiant heat. It features significant NOx reduction, over 30% improvement in energy efficiency, uniform heat distribution, noise reduction design, excellent durability (5+ years lifespan), compact design, multi-fuel compatibility (LNG/LPG), automatic temperature control, and multiple safety devices.

compactHeater.title: Compact Metal Heater
compactHeater.description: A high-efficiency industrial gas heater applying metal fiber burner technology. Available in three types: direct-fired (rapid heating of large spaces), indirect-fired (for environments requiring clean air heating), and hybrid (simultaneous heating and dehumidification) — providing solutions optimized for various industrial sites.
features: Direct-fired — rapid heating of large spaces

globalPartners.title: Global Technology Partners
globalPartners.subtitle: The technological heritage of our partners dating back to the 1940s meets NBPKOREA's field experience to create the best solutions
globalPartners.midcoDesc: NBPKOREA has maintained a technology partnership with MIDCO International, an industrial burner specialist based in Chicago, USA, since 2007, incorporating global-level combustion technology and strengthening product competitiveness through joint development.
globalPartners.ecostarDesc: NBPKOREA established a technology partnership with ECOSTAR, an industrial combustion equipment specialist based in Turkey, in 2013. We supply equipment that meets European market technical standards and continuously improve our technological capabilities through mutual technology exchange.
globalPartners.combhexDesc: NBPKOREA has continued a technology partnership with CombHEX in Turkey since 2018. Based on practical experience in heat exchange and combustion systems, we are expanding both equipment quality and on-site applicability together.

items.question: What is the quote request process?
items.answer: After submitting a quote request via the website inquiry form or by phone (031-434-6566~7), our responsible engineer will assess your site conditions and submit a customized design and quotation. Schedules may vary depending on site conditions.

items.question: Can you provide custom-designed solutions for our site conditions?
items.answer: Yes. NBPKOREA designs and manufactures all equipment tailored to your site conditions (airflow, temperature, humidity, installation space, etc.). Our engineers will assess your site and propose the optimal specifications.

items.question: Can I receive product technical materials or catalogs?
items.answer: All company materials are available after approval from the CEO. Please submit a request through the inquiry form and we will review and provide guidance.

items.question: Is it possible to have an in-person consultation?
items.answer: If necessary for a quote consultation, we can arrange a visit consultation after scheduling with our representative. Please contact us by phone or website inquiry and we will provide guidance.
